summary: Dominant failure: chapters 13 and 14 repeat the same collapse-rescue-campfire rhythm after chapter 12 has already established the Margins pattern, and the window also carries a visible one-level slip in Vel's on-page Ledger math.

findings.evidence: The route journal's two-hand clue is planted when Fallow notes that the handwriting is not Vel's at snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5391, repeated when Kem notices the open spread isn't hers at snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5536, then reintroduced again as 'the two handwritings' before he asks where her writing stops at snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6295 and snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6333.
findings.problem: Read consecutively, the journal-handwriting detail gets reintroduced three chapters in a row before it yields materially new understanding. By chapter 14 the clue feels like repeated reader reorientation rather than mounting pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Let chapter 12 plant the two-hand journal once, let chapter 13 use the journal without restating the same clue, and let chapter 14 turn it directly into new information or new leverage the moment Kem notices it again.
findings.acceptance_test: Across this window, a back-to-back reader encounters the two-hand journal as one clean setup and one clear payoff or escalation rather than three near-reintroductions of the same fact.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 owns the fix by default because it is the later chapter still reorienting the reader to an already-planted clue instead of cashing it out immediately.

findings.evidence: Chapter 13 repeatedly treats Vel as already at eighteen at snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5686, snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5778, and snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5904.
findings.problem: The only explicit on-page Vel spend before this boundary is the one-level footbridge reinforcement in chapter 12, so the drop to eighteen arrives with one level unaccounted for. Because Ledger arithmetic is the novel's central mechanic, this reads as a visible continuity slip rather than background noise.
findings.rewrite_direction: Either surface the missing one-level Vel spend on-page before chapter 13 starts treating her as eighteen, or revise the chapter 13 references so the public count matches the reader-visible spend trail.
findings.acceptance_test: A reader can trace Vel's level from the start of this window through every on-page spend and arrive at the chapter 13 and chapter 14 counts with no missing level.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 13 is the first chapter that starts using the lower count as settled fact, so it owns making the chapter-12-to-chapter-13 handoff legible.

findings.evidence: Chapter 13 builds as road collapse, emergency spend, settlement labor, and a night camp framed by Dren in the middle and Vel with Maren's journal at snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5478, snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5718, snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5814, and snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5912. Chapter 14 then repeats the same macro-rhythm with another collapse rescue, another community work line, and another night camp framed by the same three-bedroll geometry and journal exchange at snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5977, snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6105, snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6177, and snapshots/cycle_03/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6355.
findings.problem: The back-to-back Kem chapters are supposed to feel like a special locked-in stretch after the betrayal, but in practice they move through nearly the same travel interruption, public competence, and night-camp arrangement. Read consecutively, chapter 14 feels like another pass through chapter 13's machinery instead of a sharper new phase of the basin approach.
findings.rewrite_direction: Give chapter 14 a different dominant shape: either bring the altered alliance terms to the front before the next public emergency, or compress the rescue labor so the chapter turns sooner toward basin-specific pressure and a materially different camp beat.
findings.acceptance_test: A reader moving directly from chapter 13 to chapter 14 can feel a distinct new pulse, with chapter 14 no longer relying on the same collapse-rescue-campfire arc that chapter 13 just used.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 is the later chapter repeating the established macro-rhythm, so it owns creating the contrast the double-Kem run needs.
